overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an abandoned industrial construction site in Night City. The scene features brutalist concrete architecture, rusted metal structures, and transitions from enclosed underpasses to open construction yards with a distinctive geodesic dome visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with industrial red metal gate

events.description: moving from dark underpass interior toward the illuminated exit past the red metal frame structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the underpass toward the red metal gate structure

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling of the underpass with exposed beams
large rust-colored metal structural frame with triangular bracing
massive concrete column supporting the overpass structure
clumps of dry brown grass and weeds growing through the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark concrete underpass with a low ceiling. The player approaches a distinctive red metal gate frame structure while walking on sandy ground with sparse dry vegetation. The environment is dimly lit with light streaming in from the far end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley with scaffolding and graffiti

events.description: exiting the underpass into a narrow alley with scaffolding on the right and graffiti-covered walls
emerging from shadow into direct midday sunlight creating harsh shadows

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow passage between tall industrial buildings with scaffolding

entered.detail: rusty metal scaffolding attached to the right building facade
concrete wall with blue and white graffiti text reading ET IN ARCADIA EGO
metal pedestrian bridge connecting two industrial buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass into a narrow industrial alley flanked by tall concrete buildings. Scaffolding covers the right wall while graffiti decorates the left. An overhead walkway bridge spans the alley above as the camera moves from shadow into bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction yard with distant geodesic dome landmark

events.description: narrow alley opens into wide construction area with view of geodesic dome and black smoke
passing abandoned vehicles scattered in the construction yard

agents.ego_description: crossing the open construction area toward the distant buildings and dome structure

entered.detail: large spherical metal structure with NC signage visible, iconic Night City landmark
thick black smoke rising from a building fire in the distance
derelict dark-colored car partially buried in sand
tall yellow tower crane against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The environment opens dramatically into a wide construction yard with a clear view of a geodesic dome landmark in the distance. Black smoke rises from burning structures while abandoned vehicles litter the sandy ground. The player moves through the sunlit wasteland toward a large building with a yellow construction crane.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building entrance with concrete staircase

events.description: beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs leading into the industrial structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs leading into the industrial building interior

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with multiple steps leading upward into the building

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase leading into a massive industrial building. The yellow construction crane looms large on the left as the environment transitions from open yard to covered interior space with artificial lighting visible inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with tree sculpture and scattered NPCs

events.description: exiting the building into an open plaza with a distinctive tree-like sculpture
encountering NPCs sitting and resting in the plaza area

agents.ego_description: emerging from the stairwell into the sunlit plaza, observing the surroundings and NPCs

notable_agents.action: sitting on the steps near the building entrance
sitting near the base of the tree sculpture in the plaza

entered.detail: tall artistic metal tree structure with branching arms in the center of the plaza
open concrete plaza with scattered debris and architectural ruins
large geometric concrete entrance frame of the building just exited

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building into a bright urban plaza featuring a distinctive metal tree sculpture at its center. Several NPCs are sitting around the area, some on the steps and others near the sculpture. The environment shifts from industrial interior to open public space with damaged buildings surrounding the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete underpass into a vast, sun-drenched industrial wasteland. It begins in the dim shadows of a low-ceilinged tunnel, moving across sandy ground and sparse vegetation toward a red metal gate frame. As the camera exits the underpass, the scene shifts into a narrow alley flanked by graffiti-covered walls and scaffolding, passing beneath an overhead walkway bridge as the lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight. The environment then opens dramatically into a wide construction yard where black smoke rises from burning structures and abandoned vehicles litter the terrain. Finally, the camera advances across the sunlit expanse toward a large building and a yellow construction crane, with a distant geodesic dome anchoring the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty industrial construction site into a bright, open urban plaza. It begins with the player ascending a wide concrete staircase, passing beneath a looming yellow construction crane as the environment shifts from an open yard into the artificial lighting of a massive industrial building. As the camera moves through the interior, the scene then opens up and expands upon exiting the structure, revealing a sunlit public square. The industrial gloom gives way to a bright plaza centered around a distinctive metal tree sculpture, where NPCs are scattered across the steps and surrounding areas amidst a backdrop of damaged city buildings.
